title: AI-driven market strategist
author: MightyChain
selftext:
Hey everyone,

Not sure if this is the right sub but im sure lots of you will get value anyways! Ive been trying find a way to make chatgpt useful for trading but had no luck. That led me to searching for other AI's that are specially meant for trading.

That led me to [Trademind.ca](http://Trademind.ca), a new beta AI stock analysis tool, and I’ve been really impressed. It’s a bit like ChatGPT but specifically trained to handle trading strategies and stock analysis. This AI is incredibly smart—it can predict future stock prices with surprising accuracy, analyze market trends, and apply various trading strategies using live web data. It’s now part of my everyday flow when making trades. I converse with it like it’s a professional stock analyst, capable of analyzing stocks far beyond human capabilities.

I want to make it clear that this isn’t an ad. I just genuinely think that some  traders might find it really helpful. There’s a 14-day free trial, so it’s definitely worth giving it a try to see if it aligns with your trading needs.

Hope this helps, and happy trading!

Cheers!
